text:
shareholder, individual or organization that owns part of a corporation through shares of its stock, also known as stockholder, stock holder. Attributes include: 
- subclass of: "stakeholder"
- instance of: "role (has characteristic: ownership)"
- partially coincident with: "investor"
- has goal: "profit maximization"
- different from: "investor (criterion used: Library of Congress Subject Headings)"
- female form of label: "akcionářka",
 "акционерка",
 "акционерка",
 "акціонерка",
 "akcjonariuszka"
- owner of: "share"
- has characteristic: "ownership"
